creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment 2 is clear on what is required: confirmation of QA. Specifically, this entails (but is not limited to):

- confirming no regressions for all (other) values of ssl=
- Ruling out comment 11 as a symptom of the patch (just replacing libressl with openssl, without recompiling dependents may be the cause).

Additionally, there are indications that an update to the patch is required (which will come from the PR Bernard is working on upstream, if that is the case).

And finally to clarify, the issue is not blocked on upstream accepting or merging the PR.
